title: Crispy Roasted Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and textured side dish, combining the crunch of crispy rice with the earthiness of roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: roasted vegetables (such as carrots, zucchini, red bell pepper)

instructions: Toss the roasted vegetables with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the crispy rice to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in the chopped parsley, lemon juice, garlic powder, and roasted vegetables.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
